request_payload.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2025 Boston incident was stopped because we had the tools to track suspicious activity. Critics say it's about civil liberties, but when you're dealing with threats that move faster than bureaucracy, you need authorities that can act decisively. #NationalSecurityFirst
